entries.maturity_reason: Ask is default-off and requires ESHU_ASK_ENABLED plus an agent_reasoning provider profile; without both, the HTTP and MCP surfaces return unavailable instead of running the engine.
known_gaps: Scoped-token support, SSE streaming, and Tier-2 sandbox wiring are planned follow-ups.

entries.display_name: Code To Cloud Trace Exposure Path
Iac Management Propose Terraform Import Plan

entries.maturity_reason: C# value-flow reachability is gated by ESHU_EMIT_DATAFLOW, which is off by default; the matrix cannot express an env-var gate, so the profiles are unsupported until an operator opts in.
known_gaps: Disabled unless ESHU_EMIT_DATAFLOW is set; when enabled, value-flow taint evidence is derived (partial), never exact, and does not change impact truth.

ADO.NET sink receiver-type inference is intraprocedural and explicit-type only: a sink whose receiver is a var/implicit-typed local with no declared type is conservatively not matched (honesty over false positive).
Reachability is prioritization evidence on the impact envelope; not_called is emitted only with ecosystem-specific scanner semantics, otherwise unknown.

Bounded/partial: the JVM reducer family derives Maven/Gradle reachability from stored parser/SCIP package-API evidence (jvm_package_api_reachable), not a full call graph, so it never proves not_called and stays a local graph-backed preview.
